GitHub to production in seconds

Deploy your apps in one click.

From GitHub to production in seconds. Build, ship, inspect, and scale from a focused dashboard built for developers.

Get Started GitHub

$ deployit connect github.com/acme/app

✓ Repository cloned

✓ Dependencies installed

✓ Build completed

https://acme.deployit.app

Connect GitHub

Import repositories and ship every branch with predictable previews.

Managed runtime

Deploy Node, React, Next.js, and Express projects with clean defaults.

Domains and SSL

Verify custom domains and keep certificates active from one view.
